title: phegopteris austroussuriensis
intro: Phegopteris austroussuriensis, also known as the Ossur fern or Autumn fern, is a type of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its golden-brown fronds with green or yellowish-green veins. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris austroussuriensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
